microcontroller.migration_note: Configuration currently targets DEVICE_TC4DX with IFX_PIN_PACKAGE_BGA436_COM. User board is KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE (TC4D7, BGA-292). Pin routing and availability must be remapped/validated for TC4D7 BGA-292; current Port 20 assignments are placeholders pending TOUTSEL verification or alternate routing.

peripheral_instance.driver_rationale: Chosen for eGTM-based PWM to provide a unified API across ATOM/TOM on TC4xx and allow flexibility to switch channels/modules without refactoring application logic. IfxEgtm_Atom_Pwm remains an alternative for strictly ATOM-focused configurations; current selection preserves migration headroom.

pin_assignments.function: EGTM0.ATOM2 PWM output (pending validation on DEVICE_TC4DX/BGA436)
pin_assignments.doc_note: IfxEgtm_PinMap does not list an EGTM0 ATOM2 mapping for Port 20 on BGA436 in available docs; TOUTSEL routing requires confirmation. Macro omitted pending verification; remap likely required for KIT_A3G_TC4D7_LITE (BGA-292).
